behavior_summary: Provides a short in-game description when the player examines a food item and implements the item's U8P_FOOD::use/consume behavior.
U8P_FOOD::look reads the item's frame/index and displays one of four short barks: 'fish', 'cooked fish', 'Torax ribs', or 'cooked Torax ribs', selecting text by the frame value.

U8P_FOOD::use handles consuming the item: it plays a short player-facing bark ('Mmmm...'), destroys the item instance (Item::destroy(this)), and calls FeedAvatar(0x02) to apply a small, fixed feeding/nutrition effect to the Avatar.
notable_control_flow: U8P_FOOD::look branches on the item's frame/index (stored to a local, local1) into four distinct bark outputs; control flow is simple conditional branching to choose the appropriate short name.
U8P_FOOD::use is linear: bark -> Item::destroy(this) -> FeedAvatar(0x02) -> suspend/terminate; there is no branching or flag manipulation.
open_questions: Exact numeric frame values corresponding to each displayed string are not present in the sidecar summary — which frame indices map to raw vs cooked variants?
The semantic magnitude of FeedAvatar(0x02) (how many hunger/health points are restored and whether other side-effects occur) is inferred but not explicitly known.
local1 is inferred to hold Item::getFrame(this) result; the original variable name/type and any additional uses beyond selecting text are unknown.

main_function.name: U8P_FOOD::look
main_function.purpose: When the player 'looks at' this food item, read the item's frame/index and show a short name/description appropriate to that variant (four short barks: fish/cooked fish/Torax ribs/cooked Torax ribs).
entry_conditions: Invoked by the engine when the player examines/inspects the item (U8P_FOOD::look interaction / process type 0x0208).

function_map.name: U8P_FOOD::look
function_map.role: Provide short description text based on item frame/index (U8P_FOOD::look/inspect handler).

function_map.name: U8P_FOOD::use
function_map.role: Consume/U8P_FOOD::use handler: play eating bark, remove item, apply feeding to Avatar.

function_map.name: Item::getFrame
function_map.role: Engine/item API to read the item's current frame/index used to select variant text.

function_map.name: Item::destroy
function_map.role: Engine/item API to remove or destroy the item instance from the world/inventory.

function_map.name: FeedAvatar
function_map.role: Engine function to apply a feeding/nutrition (or small heal) effect to the Avatar; called with constant 0x02.

external_calls.purpose: Read the item's frame/index to decide which short description to display.
Remove/destroy the item instance after it is consumed.
Apply a small, fixed feeding/nutrition effect to the Avatar (argument 0x02); exact quantitative effect is inferred.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Provides a short in-game description when the player examines a food item and implements the item's U8P_FOOD::use/consume behavior.
